text:
Novig Support here — I understand this is frustrating, especially after three attempts over two weeks with money sitting untraded in your account.

I can't tell you the specific reason your ID was rejected from here — that determination comes from our KYC team, and issues can range from image quality to how the document was captured. I don't have that detail in front of me.

I'm routing this to our KYC ops team to review your submissions directly and give you specific feedback on what's needed. A human will follow up with next steps.

Novig Support
